column4:
Case Intake & Initial Strategy Conference
1.2 hours

Initial consultation and factual intake

Review of employment history and probationary status

Discussion of medical conditions and accommodation requests

Strategic assessment of claims under Rehab Act and Title VII

Document Review & Chronology Analysis
2.3 hours

Review of Reasonable Accommodation requests and determinations

Review of EEO Counselor Notices

Review of termination documentation

Review of scholarship (EISP) obligations and related directives

Review of employee-drafted case summary

Development of detailed chronological timeline

Legal Research & Statutory Analysis
1.8 hours

Research regarding federal-sector “make whole” remedies

Analysis of Rehabilitation Act standards

Review of VA Handbook and VHA Directive requirements

Research on front pay, compensatory caps, and fee-shifting

Review of 180-day appointment rule implications.

Mediation Preparation & Agreement Execution
0.7 hours

Review and execution of Agreement to Mediate

Analysis of confidentiality provisions under ADRA

Preliminary mediation positioning

Client Counseling & Strategy Sessions
2.0 hours

Counseling regarding reinstatement vs. separation remedies

Discussion of damages model (back pay, front pay, vesting impact)

Discussion of scholarship waiver exposure

Mediation preparation and settlement posture
